title: Baryon Resonance Analysis from SAID
author_string: R. A. Arndt, W. J. Briscoe, M. W. Paris, I. I. Strakovsky, R. L. Workman
abstract: We discuss the analysis of data from piN elastic scattering and single pion photo- and electroproduction. The main focus is a study of low-lying non-strange baryon resonances. Here we concentrate on some difficulties associated with resonance identification, in particular the Roper and higher P11 states.
comment: 4 pages, 6 figures; Nstar2009 Conf Proceedings; small revision
